title: New Eva 222 Scenes revealed
wikitext:
[]: [Spoilers] New Eva 2.22 Scenes revealed!             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat May 08, 2010 5:22 pm Hi (and bye). I'll just leave this here. Enjoy!

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sat May 08, 2010 5:39 pm so is the new song at the end a famous one? Id love to hear it :) Synch Test! YAY

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat May 08, 2010 5:56 pm The blog states that Asuka’s line is “so splendidly nonchalant that you feel cheated”. Lol, that should be interesting. Thanks for the heads up sailor.

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Sat May 08, 2010 6:04 pm I don't know if I followed you there. Is 2.22 not going to play the same version of “Please Give Me Wings” as 2.0?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat May 08, 2010 8:12 pm It's just an extra feature; 1.XX had a similar thing (though 1.XX swapped out Sagisu Angel of Doom for a Joseph-Maurice Ravel version): [url]http://www.evageeks.org/2010/04/evangelion-2-22-screening[/url] wrote: “I Would Give You Anything” is an English adaption of the song Tsubasa o Kudasai (Please give Me Wings). (“I Would Give You Anything” can be heard in place of Tsubasa o Kudasai as one of the extra features of the 2.22 DVD/Blu-Ray Disc).

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Sat May 08, 2010 8:56 pm Here is another change I found between 2.0 and 2.22 inolving the 8th angel 2.0 http://img88.imageshack.us/i/vlcsnap15065.png/ 2.22 http://img691.imageshack.us/i/vlcsnap17289.png/

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sun May 09, 2010 10:38 am Just imagine how screwed up we would be if this were the original trailer for 2.0...it would be and instant headshot on the mindrape gage

[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Sun May 09, 2010 1:06 pm Magnitude of retake... [URL=http://img576.imageshack.us/img576/9347/ha37.jpg] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun May 09, 2010 1:15 pm ^ So all those scenes were touched up in some way? Talk about perfectionism. *The 10th Angel attacking a building.

[]:             Quote Post by cambaprecoz » Sun May 09, 2010 2:21 pm So if you people ever wonder how much of a control freak and a perfectionist Mr. Anno is, just ask someone to post the "edited scenes" picture of 2.22

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun May 09, 2010 4:30 pm Post has been updated given new information from the Min Na No Eva Fan blog: http://www.evageeks.org/2010/05/evangelion-2-22-new-scenes/ I'm now confused as hell because the other blog clearly mentioned a synchro test for the 3 pilots, but this one says nothing of such. I guess the big cut is still featured, but Asuka DOES say that line to Misato later on? Ugh, WTF. CONFLICTING REPORTS FROM 2 DIFFERENT SOURCES ABOUT A MAJOR SCENE OR LACKTHEREOF SUCKS!

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun May 09, 2010 4:44 pm Yeah, it is kind of confusing, though the first report makes more sense in a way.;; p.s you forgot to say (bai again) btw. 8D

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun May 09, 2010 5:50 pm I'm confused. What's this "What a shame" line of Shikinami's?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun May 09, 2010 6:36 pm People, please learn to use the search function! From here down: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=346077#346077 (If there is another update on this, I'm going to have to pass on posting it. I have way too many other things going on. Sorry!) 7th-chan wrote: p.s you forgot to say (bai again) btw. 8D

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon May 10, 2010 4:19 pm Are you sure about the "Maicchingu" or whatever? I've been searching and found that the phrase comes from a manga/anime called Maicchingu Machiko Sensei . But I couldn't quite understand what it was used for there ('tseems the phrase became quite popular during the 90's). Something about one of her students groping teacher Machiko?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon May 10, 2010 4:38 pm CtHuLhU wrote: Magnitude of retake... [URL=http://img576.imageshack.us/img576/9347/ha37.jpg] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon May 10, 2010 7:43 pm Snap crackle fuck! That's a lot of post release correction. I wonder if aside from the new scenes this will feel drastically different. Hell, maybe they fixed/removed/changed my two biggest beefs with 2.0- the unnecessary Crotch Closeup of Asuka rolling over in bed and Misato's odd and out of character mini-orgasm she has when Kaji gives her a can of coffee in the NERV cafeteria. Also it's great to hear the new scenes aren't Mari playing with bunny rabbits or something like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Mon May 10, 2010 11:56 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Now if only they'd announce the Groundwork and the Complete Records Collection for 2.0........

[]:             Quote Post by carla » Tue May 11, 2010 10:45 am ooohh, i see the stooge's names mentioned in there. yay! PLUS more Asuka and a scene with the three pilots? i'm gonna love this release.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Tue May 11, 2010 11:05 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: Misato's odd and out of character mini-orgasm she has when Kaji gives her a can of coffee in the NERV cafeteria.
summary:
[]: [Spoilers] New Eva 2.22 Scenes revealed!             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat May 08, 2010 5:22 pm Hi (and bye). I'll just leave this here. Enjoy!

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sat May 08, 2010 5:39 pm so is the new song at the end a famous one? Id love to hear it :) Synch Test! YAY
